chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-1792 of 2021 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.7586/2021. 3. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025. No one is in attendance on behalf of the Petitioner and no intimation has been received. A perusal of the Order Sheet reflects that this Petition has been pending over a protracted period without having been properly pursued. Under the given circumstances, it appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in the Petition, which stands dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
